case_title: SHEENA LE VS. LEE BRICE GOMES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LE, SHEENA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00) SERVED JUL-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LE, SHEENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE $3,057.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,197.00, $347 MD; $1,060 D.C.; $1,650 PAIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LE, SHEENA GOMES, LEE BRICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2018 BY PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD. 506 PLAINTIFF SHEENA LE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEE BRICE GOMES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
